title: fix(audio): add seed param to enable deterministic caching
author: fisventurous

gist.headline: Planting audio seeds
gist.blurb: Added a seed parameter to our audio endpoints so you can generate the exact same voice or music track on repeat. Perfect for locking in that flawless take.
gist.summary: Added an optional seed parameter to the audio generation endpoints to enable deterministic outputs and distinct cache variants for ElevenLabs models.
gist.impact: Developers can now pass a seed to reproduce specific audio generations, making it easier to lock in the perfect voice or music track.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot planting a glowing musical note seed into a lime green flower pot, representing the new 'seed' parameter for audio generation. The Nomnom creature listening to headphones.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny headphones, planting a glowing musical note seed into a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot. The round tan nomnom creature sits nearby, happily listening to a retro boombox. Soft pastel lavender and mint gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
